name: Mary Mancini
subject: TOMORROW: TNDP Blue Cocktail Holiday Party - Tickets Still Available
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:

Dear Peter,
Tickets are still available for the **[TNDP Blue Cocktail Holiday Party](https://act.myngp.com/el/bQ3rRjBgjY9_wONY76AxzGeghrgG3Qv-HP4YIdh9PZo=/iYxnhurVJ-yu-1jBG4B-mWUFU-vNPsaRc_Gx92vIva8=)**. Grab your Christmas sweater and join us for cocktails and a Christmas celebration in Nashville tomorrow evening (Tuesday, December 8).

Purchase tickets and sponsorships below. We hope to see you there!

TNDP 2018 Blue Cocktail Holiday Party
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/bQ3rRjBgjY9_wONY76AxzGeghrgG3Qv-HP4YIdh9PZo=/tCwPxY_IG8O75Esg2hNvWpFNqUGgwJahZWMDHINPdmo=?fbclid=IwAR02A0MhSuC5vjPBFES040Rv4aRhKaFDygkJK1AS-o0O6pMODldiN1A_RNM)

name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: Fwd: urgent threat to our planet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
Friends: Since reaching out earlier this week, the response has been incredible. Already, 4,023 people like you have spoken out, demanding the Trump administration take aggressive action to stop climate change.
This is one of the defining issues of our generation, and we cannot afford another two years of the Trump administration's inaction. **That 's why I still need another 977 people to join me in demanding immediate, aggressive action to stop climate change - but I noticed you haven't yet added your name. **
**Please, will you add your name and join me in demanding climate action now? Here 's the best link: **[https://petitions.signforgood.com/DGA-climatereport](https://petitions.signforgood.com/DGA-climatereport/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=shaheen2&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fcjs-climatepriorities%3Fcode%3Djtk940-ja-nd)****
Thank you,
Jeanne

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Jeanne Shaheen
Date: Wed, Dec 12, 2018 at 6:02 PM
Subject: urgent threat to our planet
To: Team Shaheen
Friends,
The Trump administration's latest report on climate change makes it clear - by not acting on climate change, we are forfeiting our children's future.
The evidence is overwhelming: Natural disasters like hurricanes, wildfires and droughts are only going to get worse, with disastrous consequences for both our environment and economy. Climate change will transform communities in every corner of our country, including right here in the Granite State. Unless we take action now, the consequences for our future - and our children's future - will be devastating.
That's why I'm asking you to speak up right now, Friends. **The United States should be leading the charge to confront the climate crisis - but instead, the Trump administration continues to ignore and deny reality.**
**I 'm demanding immediate, aggressive action on climate change from this administration, and I need 5,000 committed supporters standing with me. Will you add your name with mine before midnight?**
**[Click here to sign the petition and demand that the Trump administration take aggressive action on climate change now!](https://petitions.signforgood.com/DGA-climatereport/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=shaheen2&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fcjs-climatepriorities%3Fcode%3Djtk940-ja-nd)**
Thank you,
Jeanne
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Shaheen for Senate email list, please click here.](http://www.democratsenators.org/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=vhBXqd%2BfHe9erKfSbPkCq%2FHo8pBbAv2a&url=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.democratsenators.org%2Fo%2F23%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2F%3FEmail%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
Contributions or gifts to Shaheen for Senate are not tax deductible.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Another Unnecessary Media Smear
body:
"This holiday season, Mrs. Trump has made every effort to spread joy and good cheer to citizens across the country..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=24a5503935&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **First Lady Melania Trump’s Spokeswoman Speaks Out**

“This holiday season, Mrs. Trump has made every effort to spread joy and good cheer to citizens across the country,” the First Lady’s Deputy Chief of Staff for Communications Stephanie Grisham writes.

“But the media consistently ignores the first lady's work on behalf of the people of this country, and children in particular, in favor of more trivial matters,” Grisham explains, responding to an attack last week by CNN contributor Kate Anderson Bower.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a36de2004a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “President Trump paid a Saturday visit to Arlington National Cemetery, where thousands of volunteers had just taken part in the rain in the annual holiday wreath-laying tribute to those who served—and died—in America’s wars,” Robert Gearty reports for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=92635084c5&e=3ee4985eea). “They do a great job, a really great job. Thank you,” the President said of these volunteers during the visit.
---
|
---
| It’s “time to finish the wall,” _[The Washington Times](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=66298e189c&e=3ee4985eea)_ editorial board argues. “Democrats feign concern for taxpayers who would pick up the tab, but a glance at the costs of illegal immigration demonstrates that the nation can hardly afford not to build it. The nation spent $2.4 billion in 2014 just to cover the costs of illegal immigrant women bearing their children in the United States.”
---
|
---
| In [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=71f642c163&e=3ee4985eea), Andy Puzder joins former Sen. Jim Talent (R-MO) to explain how President Trump’s tough stand on trade with China will benefit America—and the world. “For decades, American presidents made sincere – if naïve – efforts to bring China into the international trading community on an equal footing with other nations . . . President Trump, by contrast, has initiated a vigorous campaign to compete with China on a number of fronts, and it’s having an impact.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=921d9bb64b&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=98a070ee99&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=c8a4c5f92c)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Health Care Alert (via Team Lipinski)
subject: the ACA was ruled unconstitutional
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Lipinski for CongressContributions or gifts to Dan Lipinski for Congress are not tax deductible
body:
http://www.lipinskiforcongress.com/ [http://www.lipinskiforcongress.com/]SUPPORTER SURVEY: Should Congress act now to defend the Affordable Care Act from elimination?
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-aca-up?refcode=DL_EM_SV_90DO_181217_1_1_yes&amount=10&recurring=auto&refcode2=e8e75080-6402-e911-9f2a-281878391efb] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-aca-up?refcode=DL_EM_SV_90DO_181217_1_1_no&amount=10&recurring=auto&refcode2=e8e75080-6402-e911-9f2a-281878391efb]
Peter,
A federal judge in Texas has ruled that the Affordable Care Act cannot stand, throwing healthcare coverage for over 20 million Americans into jeopardy.
Democrats are already appealing the ruling, but it’s clear that these attempts to undermine affordable health care will never stop.
That’s why Dan has co-sponsored critical legislation to enable the House to defend the ACA in court.
But right now, we need to hear YOUR opinion on this incredibly consequential move:
SUPPORTER SURVEY: Should Congress act now to defend the Affordable Care Act from elimination?
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-aca-up?refcode=DL_EM_SV_90DO_181217_1_1_yes&amount=10&recurring=auto&refcode2=e8e75080-6402-e911-9f2a-281878391efb] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-aca-up?refcode=DL_EM_SV_90DO_181217_1_1_no&amount=10&recurring=auto&refcode2=e8e75080-6402-e911-9f2a-281878391efb]

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
This is because of you.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7ae3d/2f5ea88d/7a0da3e0/2cbdd5bc/1092073722/VEsH/ "https://www.facebook.com/jayinslee/") Friend, In a little less than one month, I'll be rolling up my sleeves as the state legislative session begins. Together, with our progressive legislature, we'll fight to pass bold climate and economic policies. We're going to continue Washington's tradition of being a national leader as we push our state forward with democratic values, leadership, and compassion for every single person who lives here. Thank you. Together, we achieved a big goal: over 2,000 donors in under a month before our freeze began. You helped prove that we have the people power to make real change, every day. You showed up for a progressive Washington this past week -- and you've been showing up for the past year. And for that, I'm deeply grateful. Thank you for letting me know I'm heading into this legislative session with you by my side. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | _Now more than ever, we must support progressive leadership in America. Follow us on Facebook to show you're with Jay Inslee as we fight for progress in Washington state and around the country._

| [LIKE OUR FACEBOOK PAGE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7ae3d/2f5ea88d/7a0da3e0/2cbdd5bc/1092073722/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/jayinslee/")

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: re: Betsy DeVos
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
The Department of Education is failing student victims of sexual assault.
|
---
| | Education Secretary Betsy DeVos released proposed policy changes that will silence student survivors of sexual assault and harassment. It is disgraceful that Secretary DeVos would ignore victims this way. We need to band together to make it perfectly clear we will _not_ tolerate it. We must speak loudly and clearly against DeVos' policy changes. [**Help us show Secretary DeVos that #WeBelieveSurvivors. We want to gather 50,000 signatures opposing this rules change. Be one of them.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cce/622b7b5b/1e47bb49/307b7d50/3201294773/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e181210") An estimated three million college students will be sexually assaulted this year. Under DeVos' new rules, schools would not be required to investigate assaults that take place in several off-campus locations. That could shut out thousands of victims harassed or assaulted at parties, bars, or online. No student should live in fear of sexual assault -- and no victim should be afraid of coming forward. Every claim should be investigated. Every victim should be treated with dignity and respect. DeVos's new policy is disgraceful. [**Make your voice heard by adding your name, then share this effort with friends on Facebook and Twitter.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cce/622b7b5b/1e47bb49/307b7d50/3201294773/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e181210") Thank you for taking action on this. Debbie
---

|
---
| | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
[Click here to unsubscribe](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cce/622b7b5b/1e47bb49/307b7d53/3201294773/VEsF/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/unsubscribe")

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump visits Arlington National Cemetery
body:
For 27 years now, each December, thousands of Americans have come together on National Wreaths Across America Day to honor our Nation’s veterans. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=25c3019c4f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • December 17, 2018
---
| | |
# **President Trump visits Arlington National Cemetery**

**For 27 years now,** each December, thousands of Americans have come together on National Wreaths Across America Day to honor our Nation’s veterans. This past Saturday, President Donald J. Trump visited Arlington National Cemetery in Virginia, thanking volunteers who came out in the pouring rain to lay wreaths at each grave.

**The Wreaths Across America organization** “shipped a staggering 1.75 million wreaths to 1,640 locations” that held ceremonies, Robert Gearty writes in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=233f1837dc&e=3ee4985eea).

**The Christmas season** is an important time to remember both our veterans and active duty service members—many of whom will be away from their families over the holidays. President Trump has made it a priority to ensure these heroes have the care and support they deserve, recently securing a record $73.1 billion in funding for the Department of Veterans Affairs (VA) to improve the quality of medical treatment.

**“They do a great job** , a really great job,” President Trump told volunteers at Arlington National this weekend. “Thank you.”

[Watch President Trump’s statement at Arlington National Cemetery](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4451b4d1c9&e=3ee4985eea).

**Vice President Pence** : [“Veterans have no better friend than President Trump”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=96a17feba9&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Video of the day: First Lady spreads holiday cheer**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=473082dc03&e=3ee4985eea "First Lady Melania Trump Participates in a Toys for Tots Event")
---
| **First Lady Melania Trump has had a busy** Christmas season. In the past week alone, she participated in a Toys for Tots drive, visited service members and families from three different branches of the military, and spent time with patients at Children's National hospital in Washington, D.C.

**“It is an honor** to be #FLOTUS to this incredible country,” the First Lady wrote on Twitter today.

**Bonus clip:** [The First Lady visits America’s heroes before Christmas](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=722496614f&e=3ee4985eea)

clean_body: For 27 years now, each December, thousands of Americans have come together on National Wreaths Across America Day to honor our Nation’s veterans. | | | | | The White House • December 17, 2018 | | | President Trump visits Arlington National Cemetery For 27 years now, each December, thousands of Americans have come together on National Wreaths Across America Day to honor our Nation’s veterans. This past Saturday, President Donald J. Trump visited Arlington National Cemetery in Virginia, thanking volunteers who came out in the pouring rain to lay wreaths at each grave. The Wreaths Across America organization “shipped a staggering 1.75 million wreaths to 1,640 locations” that held ceremonies, Robert Gearty writes in . The Christmas season is an important time to remember both our veterans and active duty service members—many of whom will be away from their families over the holidays. President Trump has made it a priority to ensure these heroes have the care and support they deserve, recently securing a record $73.1 billion in funding for the Department of Veterans Affairs (VA) to improve the quality of medical treatment. “They do a great job , a really great job,” President Trump told volunteers at Arlington National this weekend. “Thank you.” . Vice President Pence : | | Video of the day: First Lady spreads holiday cheer | "First Lady Melania Trump Participates in a Toys for Tots Event" | First Lady Melania Trump has had a busy Christmas season. In the past week alone, she participated in a Toys for Tots drive, visited service members and families from three different branches of the military, and spent time with patients at Children's National hospital in Washington, D.C. “It is an honor to be #FLOTUS to this incredible country,” the First Lady wrote on Twitter today.
